scenarios.name: trivial-doc-fix
success_criteria: advise keeps effort minimal
advise skips unnecessary role-lane team execution
advise does not recommend proofrun unless evidence is explicitly required

scenarios.name: docs-change
success_criteria: advise routes documentation work to docs-change
formal handoff still requires proofcheck
workflow intent is not proof

scenarios.name: code-change
success_criteria: advise recommends scout before execution
advise requires proofrun evidence before proofcheck
advise requires passing bound proofcheck before handoff

scenarios.name: review-only
scenarios.goal: review this PR and summarize risks
success_criteria: advise does not recommend proofrun
report must not claim execution happened from review intent
formal ORRO handoff still requires proofcheck if used

scenarios.name: verification-only
success_criteria: advise recommends proofcheck over proofrun
Depone remains the verifier
verification-only does not launch execution

scenarios.name: release-readiness
success_criteria: advise recommends readiness and distribution checks
engine-lock remains metadata, not proof
release readiness does not imply assurance

scenarios.name: risky-change
success_criteria: advise requires human review
advise does not recommend auto proofrun
risky changes keep proofcheck and handoff gates

scenarios.name: scout-only-blocked
scenarios.goal: verify scout-only artifacts are not enough for proofcheck
success_criteria: scout-only artifacts must not pass proofcheck
next/report must not say ready-for-handoff
ORRO stops instead of guessing when execution evidence is missing

scenarios.name: stale-verdict-blocked
scenarios.goal: verify copied stale proofcheck verdict cannot allow handoff
success_criteria: copied proofcheck verdict is not an input trust root
stale verdict must block handoff
report must not claim complete from stale verifier output
